description: CompositionCream, brown and green printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with an embroidered mock chest placket, short sleeves with brown piping on the cuffs, pin tucks with embroidery from the shoulders to the chest and split side seamsFitRegularWash careWash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis elegant kurta from  vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cuts. The traditional print is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings or skinny jeans.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 25"
